title: Director tick #3 substrate (behaviour-note + roster-truth + operating-model): three-lane complementary fan-out shape ratified; owner-coherence-moment 5/5 composed; 2 gates remain before surface
body:
Director tick #3 substrate event (behaviour-note + roster-truth + operating-model ratification).

## What just landed (the three-lane complementary shape)

Owner direction at 15:17Z reframed the knip-cure from strip-and-annotate (my superseded Path 1) to **land-the-consumers + fan-out specialist subagents**. In the ~3 minutes following, three agents returned from compaction with cycle-overlap-aware complementary-boundary offers that compose into a single three-lane operating model:

| Lane | Agent | Temporal position | Specialist mix | Question shape |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Twilit Scattering Twilight** (8d8d93) | Authoring | — (no dispatch) | Consumer-landing draft from original-author intent + FM-2 P2 cure plan's named consumer-class + Ferny's synthesis |
| 2 | **Ferny Fruiting Root** (ee16a4) | Pre-landing design | type-expert + architecture-expert-fred + assumptions-expert (code-expert refresh optional) | Is the shape we're about to land architecturally sound? |
| 3 | **Charcoal Brazing Kiln** (7c7327) | Post-landing adversarial | architecture-expert-wilma + assumptions-expert + test-expert | Is the shape we just landed safe under stress, does its meta-frame stand up, are the tests doing real work? |
| Marshal | **Ashen Brazing Crucible** (53dad4) | On bundle convergence | — (gate-runner) | Husky chain + commit-msg lint; tree-green broadcast |

First-broadcast convention upheld (Twilit ST 15:17:32Z → Ferny 15:18:23Z → Charcoal 15:20:27Z); complementary boundaries; no overlap. This is the architectural-excellence shape for the owner's "fan out subagents" direction at a TEAM level — varied specialists, varied temporal positions, varied question shapes, single converged bundle.

## Substrate carry-forward (Ashen's pre-compaction code-expert dispatch)

Ashen dispatched `code-expert` at transcript `a671739a3663dded9` before compacting at 15:16Z owner direction. Verdict carried forward to Ferny's lane:

- Class A clean strips: `WatcherErrorKind` re-export at `comms-use-cases.ts:8` AND `WatcherTickStatus` re-export at `comms-use-cases.ts:9` (bonus signal — both lines are dead duplicates)
- Class B preserve-class: `watcherHeartbeatSchema` + `WatcherIdentity` in `watcher-heartbeat.ts:54+94` — **FM-2 P2 cure plan ALREADY names a concrete consumer-class** (substrate ready for Twilit ST's authoring)

This means Twilit ST has TWO substrate sources for consumer-shape design: their own FM-2 P2 plan v2 (their authoring; references concrete consumer-class) + Ferny's incoming synthesis (multi-axis verification).

## Marshal-role retention across Ashen's compaction

Ashen compacted at 15:16Z owner direction. Marshal role retains Ashen's identity by default per their handoff record `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-ashen-compaction.md`. Their monitors `bbpt3vr0t` + `baws258jo` stay armed across compaction. When the consumer-landing bundle converges, Ashen marshal-cycles on resume.

If team dynamics shift (e.g., bundle ready BEFORE Ashen resumes AND wait is unproductive), I retain re-routing authority per Ashen's explicit instruction. Default: hold for Ashen.

## Owner-coherence-moment status (still 5/5 composed; surfacing gated)

- ✓ Charcoal C2/C5 architectural-direction broadcast (14:28:55Z)
- ✓ Ashen throughput-cure substrate broadcast (14:55:45Z)
- ✓ Pattern v2 ship-verdict (Ferny self-attest 15:01:06Z + Charcoal Wilma synthesis 14:30Z)
- ✓ PDR-076 v2 LANDED `db4d8b3a` + (C) SPLIT open question
- ✓ Twilit ST FM-2 P2 plan v2 + plan-Wilma verdict (Ferny dispatch `a2e16a2e367255e07` SAFE-WITH-CONDITIONS)

All five components present in substrate. Surfacing held until:
1. Tree returns to green from Twilit ST/Ashen consumer-landing cycle
2. Charcoal's post-landing adversarial fan-out clears (or owner accepts known-residuals)

Two gates remaining before owner-surface.

## Active roster post-third-resume

| Agent | Status | Lane |
|---|---|---|
| Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (6966d4) | **Director** | Routing + substrate-writing + owner-surface |
| Ashen Brazing Crucible (53dad4) | **Marshal (compacting; monitors armed)** | Bundle marshal-cycle on resume |
| Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93) | **Implementer-author (active)** | Consumer-landing draft (file re-reads in flight; no working-tree writes yet) |
| Ferny Fruiting Root (ee16a4) | **Implementer-dispatch-lead (active)** | Pre-landing 3-4-way fan-out dispatch |
| Charcoal Brazing Kiln (7c7327) | **Implementer-dispatch-standby (active)** | Post-landing fan-out, gated on tree-green |
| Scorched Tempering Kiln (52b263) | Outgoing Director (session closed) | — |

5 active operational agents this Director window (4 implementer-class + 1 Director). Substantial post-compaction return density; the rotating-cast model is holding up.

## Standing-direction reinforcement

The three-lane complementary shape exists because three agents read the owner direction "fan out subagents" + the standing-direction broadcast from tick #1 (encouragement to fan out + per-agent lane-fit suggestions) and self-organised into complementary boundaries via team-start broadcasts. The team picked up the standing-direction without my having to route each piece. Substrate observation: standing-direction broadcasts compose with team-start cycle-overlap discipline to produce self-organising boundary clarification when the owner-direction shape is clear.

## Idle-tick counter

0 (this tick had substantial substrate ratification + four directed routing events in the last ~8 min).

## Single highest-priority surface forward

Ferny's pre-landing fan-out verdict-synthesis landing as a directed event to me with concrete subagent transcript ids. Once synthesis lands, route consumer-landing scope back to Twilit ST; their authoring proceeds; bundle converges; Ashen marshal-cycles; Charcoal post-landing fan-out fires; owner-coherence-moment surfaces.

## Tag

behaviour-note + roster-truth + operating-model-ratification.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4 (Director, tick #3)
